label: UC Berkeley — Doudna Lab
sub: Site of 2012 CRISPR-Cas9 discovery; Jennifer Doudna's Innovative Genomics Institute

label: Broad Institute, Cambridge MA
sub: Feng Zhang lab: first CRISPR editing in human cells (Jan 2013); holds key human-cell CRISPR patents

label: Harvard Medical School — Church Lab
sub: George Church lab co-published first human CRISPR editing (Jan 2013); multiplex genome editing pioneer

label: NIH / NHGRI, Bethesda MD
sub: National Human Genome Research Institute: funds CRISPR research; oversees RAC gene therapy review

label: FDA CBER, Silver Spring MD
sub: Approved Casgevy Dec 8, 2023 — first US CRISPR therapy approval for sickle cell disease

label: CRISPR Therapeutics, Cambridge MA
sub: Co-developer of Casgevy with Vertex; founded 2014 by Charpentier; leads allogeneic CAR-T programs

label: Vertex Pharmaceuticals, Boston MA
sub: Casgevy commercial partner; managing global ATC network; pricing at $2.2M per patient

label: Editas Medicine, Cambridge MA
sub: Founded 2013 by Zhang, Church, Doudna, Liu; leads EDIT-101 in vivo eye CRISPR program

label: Intellia Therapeutics, Cambridge MA
sub: First in vivo CRISPR clinical proof-of-concept (NTLA-2001, ATTR); LNP delivery platform

label: Beam Therapeutics, Cambridge MA
sub: David Liu co-founder; base editing platform; BEAM-101 in Phase 1 for sickle cell disease

label: University of Pennsylvania, Philadelphia
sub: Carl June lab: first US IND for ex vivo CRISPR trial in cancer immunotherapy (T-cell PD-1 editing)

label: St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, Memphis
sub: Major CLIMB trial site for exa-cel (Casgevy); pediatric sickle cell and beta-thalassemia CRISPR treatments

label: Sarah Cannon Research, Nashville TN
sub: Where Victoria Gray received first US CTX001 treatment (Jul 2019); now authorized Casgevy treatment center

label: UCSF, San Francisco CA
sub: Innovative Genomics Institute (IGI) partner; Fyodor Urnov-led translational CRISPR programs

label: Stanford University, Palo Alto CA
sub: CRISPR ethics research (Hank Greely, Bioethics); stem cell gene therapy trials; Cas12a development

label: Sichuan University, Chengdu
sub: Site of world's first human CRISPR clinical trial (Nov 2016): PD-1-edited T-cells for lung cancer

label: Peking University, Beijing
sub: Early CRISPR cancer immunotherapy trials; partnered with international consortia; He Jiankui's PhD alma mater

label: Francis Crick Institute, London
sub: First UK licence (Feb 2016) to edit human embryos for basic research (Kathy Niakan's lab)

label: MHRA, London
sub: First regulator in world to approve Casgevy (Nov 16, 2023) for SCD and beta-thalassemia

label: European Medicines Agency, Amsterdam
sub: Conditionally approved Casgevy (Feb 2024) for SCD and TDT in EU member states

label: Vilnius University, Lithuania
sub: Virginijus Šikšnys lab: independent CRISPR discovery (2012); 2018 Kavli Prize in Nanoscience

label: University College London (UCL)
sub: Great Ormond Street Hospital / UCL: base editing trial for T-cell acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (T-ALL)
